Your Custom Baby
Sleeping Bag Factory

OEM & ODM manufacturer specializing in baby sleeping bags — organic cotton, bamboo, and merino wool. Full TOG range (0.5–3.5), custom sizing, prints, and private label. Factory-direct from Shandong, China.

Product Range

Full TOG Range, Fully Customizable

Every TOG rating is available in all three fabric options. Custom sizing, colors, prints, and labeling included.

🌿
Muted
Tones
Premium Muslin – Summer Series
0.5 TOG · Room temp 24–27°C

Sage Green, Terracotta & Sand — the 2026 "Emotional Parenting" palette. Organic muslin, OEKO-TEX certified, OEM/ODM ready.

New Launch
View Full Listing →
☀️
0.5
TOG Summer Bag
Room temp 24–27°C

Lightweight sleeping bag for warm nights. Ideal for travel and summer collections. Breathable organic cotton or bamboo.

View Details →
🌤️
1.0
TOG All-Season Bag
Room temp 20–24°C

Best-selling weight for spring and autumn. Versatile for year-round stocking. Available in all fabric options.

View Details →
🍂
2.5
TOG Winter Bag
Room temp 16–20°C

Warm and cozy for autumn and winter nights. Popular with European and North American buyers. Premium fill options.

View Details →
❄️
3.5
TOG Cold-Climate Bag
Room temp 12–16°C

Maximum warmth for cold climates and Nordic markets. Merino wool and heavyweight fill available.

View Details →
📏 Standard Sizes: Newborn (0–3M) · Small (3–9M) · Medium (9–18M) · Large (18–36M) — Custom fit grading available on request
OEM / ODM Services

Your Brand.
Our Factory.

From mood board to finished product — we handle every step. Bring us a tech pack, a sample, or just an idea.

🎨

Fabric & Color Development

Pantone matching, exclusive dye lots, custom fabric weights and knit structures.

🖨️

Print & Embroidery

All-over prints, placement prints, woven labels, embroidered logos. Non-toxic inks.

📐

Custom Sizing & Grading

Work from your spec sheet or we develop a graded size chart from scratch.

🔗

Zipper & Hardware Options

Two-way zippers, safety flaps, snap closures. EN 16781 compliant throughout.

🏷️

Private Label & Packaging

Woven labels, hang tags, care labels, custom retail packaging ready for your market.

How It Works

01

Send Inquiry

Share your requirements via form or WhatsApp

02

Quotation

Detailed pricing within 24–48 hours

03

Sample

Pre-production sample in 10–15 days

04

Approval

Review, approve, and confirm bulk order

05

Production & Ship

Bulk ready in 30–45 days · FOB Qingdao

Start My Order →
Material Options

Three Premium Fabrics

Every material is safety-tested for infants and available in GOTS-certified organic versions.

🌿

Organic Cotton

Our bestseller — breathable, hypoallergenic, and year-round comfortable. Available in jersey, interlock, and waffle knit.

GOTS CertifiedHypoallergenicBreathableSoft-touch finish
🎋

Bamboo Blend

Naturally antibacterial and moisture-wicking. Bamboo viscose blends deliver silky softness and temperature regulation.

AntibacterialMoisture-wickingUltra-softThermo-regulating
🐑

Merino Wool

Premium natural insulation for winter and cold-climate collections. Machine washable in fine gauges, non-itch.

Natural insulationTemp-regulatingMachine washableNon-itch fine gauge
Certifications

Built for Global Markets

Our certifications are your sourcing shortcut — proof of organic integrity, ethical production, and safety compliance.

Request Audit Reports
🌱

GOTS — Global Organic Textile Standard

Full organic supply chain certification from raw fiber to finished product. Required by most EU and North American organic baby brands.

✅

BSCI — Business Social Compliance Initiative

Factory audited for fair labor, safe working conditions, and ethical sourcing. Audit reports available on request.

🛡️

EN 16781 Safety Compliance

Our sleeping bags are designed and tested to meet European safety standard EN 16781 for infant sleep products.

Request a Quote or Sample

Let's Create Together

We reply to all inquiries within 24 hours (Mon–Fri). For urgent requests, WhatsApp is fastest.
